title: Forgotten Mobs
body:
Introducing some of your favorite mobs from DND 5e Monster Manual, as well as Volo's Guide to Monsters. This mod adds monsters from your favorite tabletop game and brings them to life in the best game ever. 

So far had been added:

* Goblins
* Shadow Dragon
* White Dragon
* Animated Armor
* Beholders
* Couatl
* Unicorn
* Griffon
* Owlbear
* Hag
* Blight
* Intellect Devourer
* Mindflayer
* Cloud Giant
* Ghost
* Displacer Beast
* Deva(Angel)
* Plantar(Angel)
* Grimlock

 

 

Each mob added has its own variants, Including the various age of the Shadow Dragon, Various toughness of the Armors, and various classes of the Goblins ect

 

Requires: Geckolib 1.19 - 3.1.40
